name: PHP Webshell String Literal
description: PHP webshell code embedded as a string literal — <?php system($_GET["c"]) or similar patterns that execute arbitrary OS commands via HTTP GET/POST parameters. Indicates the package is deploying a webshell for remote command execution. Technique observed in strapi-plugin-cron / strapi-plugin-events supply-chain attack.

patterns.message: PHP webshell code in string literal: system() call — remote command execution via HTTP request.
PHP webshell code in string literal: user-controlled input ($_GET/$_POST/$_REQUEST) — remote command execution via HTTP request.
